steps.title: Find the singular subject
steps.content: The subject is "the presence," which is singular. The long phrase about fossilized microbacteria only modifies that subject and does not control the verb. The sentence needs a singular present-tense verb.

steps.title: Match presence with its verb
steps.content: A uses the plural or base form, so "the presence reinforce" is incorrect. B uses plural "have," and D uses plural "are." The singular verb form agrees with "the presence" in the sentence skeleton "the presence reinforces claims." The answer is C.
